name: rtlsdr_radio
description: Receive FM and DAB/DAB+ radio using RTL-SDR USB tuners. IMPORTANT: Restart Volumio before enabling this plugin.
author: Just a Nerd

volumio_info.details: Receive FM and DAB/DAB+ radio using RTL-SDR USB tuners. IMPORTANT: Restart Volumio before enabling this plugin.
volumio_info.changelog: v0.9.6 - Fixed message element rendering: Changed diagnostics_purpose and diagnostics_save_explanation from 'message' elements to 'section' elements with 'description' field (matches working Volumio plugin pattern)
